title: PDF exports display low res images
excerpt: Our company utilizes Monday.com for Business Process Documentation using Docs. When exporting the Doc PDF, the screenshot images we’ve added to the doc print in low resolution. Please consider an enhancement to print ima…

posts.author: chet (Chet Gnet)
posts.cookedHtml: Our company utilizes Monday.com for Business Process Documentation using Docs. When exporting the Doc PDF, the screenshot images we’ve added to the doc print in low resolution. Please consider an enhancement to print images in high resolution for PDF exports.

posts.author: VP1 (Vijay Parikh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

I have raised similar ticket 6 months back. No action yet. I am not sure if its gonna be fixed.

posts.author: desmonda (Andrew Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml: @Monday.com… This is still an issue!!

posts.author: jmorrow (Julie Morrow)
posts.cookedHtml: Please fix! We are trying to use gantt exports for clients and they look really bad

posts.author: Chloecerami (Chloe Cerami)
posts.cookedHtml: We’re having an issue with images not appearing when exported to a PDF. Is this issue being worked on?
